structural_verification.evidence: P11 vacuous (>=0 on Nat). Replaced with log-bounded + session-consistency + seq-uniqueness. All 3 verified sound.

proposal.technique_name: multi-source vector clocking with per-source cursors
proposal.claim: P11 >= 0 conjuncts are vacuous on Nat-typed cursors. Replacing with log-bounded + session-consistency + seq-uniqueness conjuncts (mirroring INV9/INV10) turns P11 into a meaningful structural invariant.

key_findings: Vacuity confirmed: >= 0 on Nat-typed variables structurally impossible to violate
log_bounded sound: each consume assigns seq = oms_seq then increments; OMSViewChange resets both seq and log atomically
session_consistency sound: OMSViewChange is the only oms_primary writer and simultaneously clears oms_log
seq_uniqueness sound: monotonic oms_seq counter prevents duplicate seqs within a session
Low severity naming issue: OMSCursorConsistency name no longer reflects primary content; rename deferred

judgment.ruling: Proposal accepted. All three replacement conjuncts verified sound by exhaustive action trace. OMS log was the least-constrained log in the spec; this closes that gap.

deferred_actions.action: rename INV11 from OMSCursorConsistency to OMSStructuralConsistency or OMSLogAndCursorConsistency
